name: iteration04-armory-pets-feedback
description: Verify Iteration 04 Armory art and tier colors, combat profile, accurate pet summary, per-slot duplicate locks/deletion, Hatch x3, notification de-duplication, toast lane, and regular/boss HUD exclusivity.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local sign=root["Fist Shop Sign"] local images,decals=0,0 for _,d in ipairs(sign:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("ImageLabel") and d.Image=="rbxassetid://104014193600358" then images+=1 elseif d:IsA("Decal") and d.Texture=="rbxassetid://104014193600358" then decals+=1 end end local colors={} local faces=true for _,name in ipairs({"Boxing Glove","Iron Knuckle","Thunder Fist","Titan Gauntlet"}) do local palm=root.Polish["City Decor"][name.." Gauntlet Palm"] colors[name]=string.format("%d,%d,%d",math.floor(palm.Color.R*255+.5),math.floor(palm.Color.G*255+.5),math.floor(palm.Color.B*255+.5)) local plate=root.Polish["City Decor"][name.." Armory Nameplate"] local front,back=false,false for _,d in ipairs(plate:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("SurfaceGui") then front=front or d.Face==Enum.NormalId.Front back=back or d.Face==Enum.NormalId.Back end end faces=faces and front and back end local parts=0 for _,d in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("BasePart") then parts+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({parts=parts,images=images,decals=decals,faces=faces,colors=colors})

steps.label: Armory graphic, both-face labels, and tier colors exist

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local sign=root["Fist Shop Sign"] local city=root["City Alert Billboard"] return H:JSONEncode({signX=sign.Size.X,signY=sign.Size.Y,signHeight=sign.Position.Y,cityZ=city.Position.Z,separated=math.abs(sign.Position.Z-city.Position.Z)>50})

steps.label: Armory landmark and city guidance billboard are visually separated

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{PetInventoryJSON='["Crystal Fox","Crystal Fox","Miner Cat"]',EquippedPetsJSON='["Crystal Fox","Crystal Fox","Miner Cat"]',DiscoveredPetsJSON='["Crystal Fox","Miner Cat"]',LockedPetsJSON='[]',Power=123,FistMastery=50,BreakSpeed=1.5,CritChance=12,WallLevel=20}) return true

steps.label: prepare duplicate pets and combat profile

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local U=game:GetService("UserInputService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local petLabel="" for _,d in ipairs(g.StatsPanel:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA("TextLabel") and string.find(d.Text,"Pets:",1,true)==1 then petLabel=d.Text end end g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab","Fists") task.wait(.3) local banner=g.GameMenu.Content:FindFirstChild("Hero City Generated Banner") local profile=g.GameMenu.Content:FindFirstChild("COMBAT PROFILE") local desc="" if profile then for _,d in ipairs(profile:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("TextLabel") and d.Text~="COMBAT PROFILE" then desc=d.Text end end end local t,c=g.Toasts,g.MobileControls local clear=t.AbsolutePosition.X+t.AbsoluteSize.X<=c.AbsolutePosition.X or t.AbsolutePosition.X>=c.AbsolutePosition.X+c.AbsoluteSize.X or t.AbsolutePosition.Y+t.AbsoluteSize.Y<=c.AbsolutePosition.Y or t.AbsolutePosition.Y>=c.AbsolutePosition.Y+c.AbsoluteSize.Y local toastSafe=t.AbsolutePosition.Y>=0 and t.AbsolutePosition.Y+t.AbsoluteSize.Y<=workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize.Y and (not U.TouchEnabled or clear) return H:JSONEncode({petLabel=petLabel,banner=banner and banner.Image or "",profile=desc,toastSafe=toastSafe,toastClear=clear})

steps.label: pet summary, Combat Profile, banner, and toast lane are accurate

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g:SetAttribute("AutomationTab","Pets") task.wait(.3) local states={} for _,r in ipairs(g.GameMenu.Content:GetChildren()) do if r:IsA("Frame") and string.match(r.Name,"^#0[12]") then for _,b in ipairs(r.Actions:GetChildren()) do if b:IsA("TextButton") and string.find(b.Name,"Lock",1,true) then states[r.Name]=b.Text end end end end return H:JSONEncode(states)

steps.label: duplicate rows expose independent lock states
deletion selects row and shifts later slot lock

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Coins=2000,Luck=1}) return true

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local pops={} for _,d in ipairs(g.RewardPops:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("TextLabel") then table.insert(pops,d) end end local nonoverlap=true for i=1,#pops do for j=i+1,#pops do local a,b=pops[i],pops[j] if a.AbsolutePosition.Y<b.AbsolutePosition.Y+b.AbsoluteSize.Y and a.AbsolutePosition.Y+a.AbsoluteSize.Y>b.AbsolutePosition.Y then nonoverlap=false end end end local toasts=0 for _,d in ipairs(g.Toasts:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("TextLabel") then toasts+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({delta=(g:GetAttribute("FeedbackCount") or 0)-(g:GetAttribute("BeforeFeedback") or 0),pops=#pops,nonoverlap=nonoverlap,toasts=toasts})

steps.label: Hatch x3 feedback stacks once per result without toast duplicates

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local s=p.RPGStats local inv=H:JSONDecode(s.PetInventoryJSON.Value) local eq=H:JSONDecode(s.EquippedPetsJSON.Value) return H:JSONEncode({coins=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value,inventory=#inv,equipped=#eq,mult=s.PetMultiplier.Value})

steps.label: Hatch x3 charges and adds three pets

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(-53,7,13) return true

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local toasts=0 for _,d in ipairs(g.Toasts:GetChildren()) do if d:IsA("TextLabel") then toasts+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({delta=(g:GetAttribute("FeedbackCount") or 0)-(g:GetAttribute("BeforeFeedback") or 0),type=g:GetAttribute("LastFeedbackType"),toasts=toasts})
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("SetStats",{WallLevel=20}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(55,10,-13) return true

steps.label: move to Iron wall inside old boss radius

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g.GameMenu.Visible=false task.wait(.5) return H:JSONEncode({target=g.TargetWallHUD.Visible,boss=g.BossHUD.Visible,title=g.TargetWallHUD.TargetTitle.Text})

steps.label: regular wall HUD suppresses idle boss HUD
Titan encounter owns boss HUD exclusively
